ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" TEXT /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "fuel" INTEGER /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "odometer" INTEGER /* Odometer reading of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" INTEGER /* Type of transmission in the vehicle */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the vehicle */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Unique Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Textual description of the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the vehicle's image */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle is featured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (available, sold, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel FOREIGN KEY ("fuel") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission FOREIGN KEY ("transmission") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency (miles per gallon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Any discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being inquired about */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date of the inquiry */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message from the customer */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (pending, responded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine
Type of fuel used by the vehicle
Type of transmission in the vehicle
Indicates if the vehicle is featured
Status of the vehicle (available, sold, under review)
Unique identifier for each fuel type
Unique identifier for each transmission type
Detailed description of the transmission type
ID of the vehicle being sold
ID of the customer making the purchase
Any discount applied to the sale
ID of the vehicle being inquired about
ID of the customer making the inquiry
